element_introduction_order.mastery_context: player starts with standard weapon; establishes core shooting mechanic
dropped by certain enemies; can be picked up for temporary invincibility or detonated to destroy all onscreen enemies
periodic boss attacks; destruction grants upgrades to forward firing gun
awarded via boss destruction; permanent progression mechanic

typical_relief_triggers: boss destruction and gun upgrade acquisition
shield power-up collection for invincibility window
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: standard vertically scrolling shooter rhythm with enemy wave progression building to boss encounters; cyclical tension/relief via power-up mechanics and upgrade rewards

difficulty_curve.early_game: introduction of basic shooting mechanics and single enemy types; establishes player vehicle choice (helicopter or jeep)
notable_spikes: boss encounters scale in difficulty with player progression
gun upgrade system provides catch-up mechanic for struggling players

notable_level_patterns.description: game supports single-player with choice of helicopter or jeep, or two-player simultaneous mode using both vehicles; dual-vehicle design mirrors spiritual predecessor Silkworm
periodic boss encounters punctuate scrolling sections; boss destruction directly awards forward gun upgrades, creating progression tempo
certain defeated enemies drop shield power-ups usable for temporary invincibility or screen-clear detonation; player decision point in risk/reward moment
